Atya.Foundation.Abstractions.description: Common abstractions shared across the Atya foundation packages.

Atya.Foundation.Guards.description: Lightweight, allocation-friendly guard clauses for argument validation.

Atya.Foundation.Primitives.description: Primitive types and value objects for the Atya foundation layer.

Atya.Foundation.Serialization.description: Serialization abstractions and helpers for the Atya foundation layer.

Atya.Foundation.Time.description: Time and clock abstractions for testable, deterministic time handling.

Atya.Diagnostics.Logging.description: Logging abstractions and dependency-injection helpers for Atya diagnostics.

Atya.Diagnostics.Metrics.description: Metrics abstractions and dependency-injection helpers for Atya diagnostics.

Atya.Diagnostics.Observation.description: Unified observation helpers that compose logging, metrics, and tracing.

Atya.Diagnostics.OpenTelemetry.description: OpenTelemetry configuration and instrumentation helpers for .NET services.

Atya.Diagnostics.Tracing.description: Tracing abstractions and dependency-injection helpers for Atya diagnostics.

Atya.Errors.Exceptions.description: Exception types and helpers for consistent error handling.

Atya.Errors.ProblemDetails.description: RFC 7807 Problem Details helpers for ASP.NET Core services.

Atya.Errors.Validation.description: Validation primitives and error helpers for the Atya error layer.

Atya.Governance.CodeQuality.description: Centralized StyleCop and .NET analyzer configuration for Atya repositories.

Atya.Governance.Testing.description: Small, focused test-only helpers for Atya packages and applications.
